payload.answer: The answer is not sufficiently grounded. The claim "No conflicts recorded" is only supported if the relevant conflict records or links were actually checked; the provided evidence does not establish that this check occurred.

entity_resolution.reason: No durable memory should be committed from an evaluation fixture or from an absence claim without verified evidence.

details: Evaluated the absence claim for groundedness.
Did not commit any durable memory.
Preserved ambiguity because the evidence does not confirm conflict-link checking.

repair_options: Qualify the answer as: "No conflicts were found in the checked records" if conflict links were checked.
If conflict links were not checked, revise to: "No conflict information was provided in the available evidence."
Add citation or evidence showing the conflict links/records were reviewed.
